title: lithocarpus laoticus
intro: Lithocarpus laoticus, also known as the Laos Lithocarpus or Laos Bur oak, is a plant species within the family Fagaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. Lithocarpus laoticus is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusions, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
